descriptionShort: Richmond Sockeyes alumni gather at 2025 banner-night or Hall of Fame commemoration event.
descriptionLong: This July 2025 video captures a moment from the Richmond Sockeyes' modern reunion and Hall of Fame induction events. The footage likely documents alumni, staff, or community members at a banner-night ceremony or official BC Hockey Hall of Fame recognition celebrating the legendary 1987 Centennial Cup–winning team.
